name: yeeflow-builder
description: Private Codex plugin for building, validating, testing, and improving Yeeflow applications using Yeeflow-specific skills.

interface.shortDescription: Private Yeeflow application-building skills for Codex.
interface.longDescription: Private Codex plugin for planning Yeeflow applications from requirements, generating and validating new .yap packages, learning from exported Yeeflow packages, generating forms, lists, dashboards, expressions, workflows, and custom code controls, and documenting accepted runtime baselines without unsafe .yapk mutation.
defaultPrompt: Plan a Yeeflow app from these requirements.
Learn this Yeeflow export before generation.
Generate a Yeeflow custom code control.
